scripts.format: prettier --write .golangci.yml .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json docker-compose.yml README.md AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/architecture.md buf.yaml buf.gen.yaml sync/sync.js sync/package.json sync/package-lock.json sync/eslint.config.js .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/copilot-instructions.md && npm run proto:format && npm run format:go
